footer.description: Precision engineering for the plastics industry. High-quality plastic manufacturing solutions based in Amman, Jordan.

home.heroDesc: High-quality plastic containers, bottles, and custom molds for industrial and commercial sectors.
home.capabilitiesDesc: Comprehensive packaging solutions engineered to meet stringent industrial specifications. From UN-certified chemical containers to food-grade beverage bottles.
home.reason1Desc: A proven track record delivering reliable packaging solutions across the Middle East and beyond.
home.reason2Desc: Rigorous quality control processes ensuring every unit meets international benchmarks.
home.reason3Desc: In-house tooling capabilities to design and produce bespoke containers for your specific needs.
home.ctaDesc: Contact our technical sales team to discuss specifications, volume requirements, and custom mold solutions.

about.heroDesc: Delivering enterprise-grade plastic manufacturing solutions with exacting standards for Jordan's industrial sector and beyond.
about.introDesc: Established in the heart of Jordan's manufacturing hub, Fourth Pyramid has built a legacy of trust and technical superiority. We operate at the intersection of scale and precision, providing robust plastic packaging and component solutions for enterprise clients.
about.blowMoldingDesc: High-volume production of hollow plastic parts with exact wall thickness distribution. Optimized for containers and industrial packaging.
about.injectionMoldingDesc: Complex solid parts with tight tolerances. High-speed multi-cavity tooling for caps, closures, and structural components.
about.qualityDesc: Our ISO-certified testing facilities ensure every unit meets rigorous structural and chemical specifications before leaving the factory floor.
about.quality2Desc: Strict adherence to safety standards for FMCG packaging.
about.quality3Desc: Automated inline pressure testing for 100% of hollow products.
about.ctaDesc: Ready to discuss your manufacturing requirements? Our team is standing by.

products.pageDesc: Explore our comprehensive range of high-quality plastic manufacturing solutions. We utilize premium materials including HDPE and PET to ensure structural integrity and enterprise-grade reliability.
products.noResults: No products found matching your criteria.

industries.title: Engineered solutions for demanding industries.
industries.desc: From stringent food-grade requirements to robust agricultural applications, Fourth Pyramid delivers precision-manufactured plastic components that scale with your enterprise.
industries.ctaDesc: Partner with Fourth Pyramid for enterprise-grade plastic manufacturing that meets your exacting specifications and volume requirements.

items.title: Detergents & Cleaners
items.description: Our HDPE and PET packaging solutions are specifically engineered to withstand aggressive chemical compounds while preventing leaching. We prioritize structural integrity and leak-proof closures for consumer safety and brand reliability.

items.title: Industrial Chemicals
items.description: Heavy-duty transport and storage require uncompromising strength. We manufacture UN-certified jerrycans, drums, and IBC components designed for extreme environments, ensuring secure transit for hazardous materials.

items.title: Food & Beverage
items.description: Maintaining freshness and extending shelf-life requires precision barriers. Our food-grade packaging utilizes advanced multi-layer technologies to protect against oxygen and moisture ingress while maintaining strict hygiene standards.

items.title: Agriculture
items.description: Built to endure harsh UV exposure and extreme weather. From heavy-duty crates to irrigation components, our agricultural plastics are formulated for longevity, providing reliable performance season after season.

quote.pageDesc: Tell us about your project requirements and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
